expectations.text: HapticFeedback.selectionClick() is called when a user taps an answer option in ProblemScreen
HapticFeedback.mediumImpact() is called when the submit/CTA button is tapped in ProblemScreen
The Correct/Not quite result label in FeedbackScreen has a larger font size or heavier font weight than the original
expectations.evidence: 3 matches for appTitle/large font style — uses AppTextStyles.appTitle (28px, w500) vs original doneMessage (22px, w400)

expectations.text: No new Color(0xFF...) or Colors.green/Colors.red literals added for the result label — stays monochromatic
Result label references AppTextStyles.* rather than an inline TextStyle with hardcoded values
